title: botrychium simplex var. cordatum
intro: Botrychium simplex var. cordatum, also known as the grass-leaf grape fern or cordate grape fern, is a type of rare and perennial fern native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to treat various health issues, such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Botrychium simplex var. cordatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and fronds can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
